sources.title: FDA's Concerns with Unapproved GLP-1 Drugs Used for Weight Loss

claims.statement: DailyMed identifies Mounjaro as tirzepatide injection indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in label-specified type 2 diabetes populations.

context.population: label-specified patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus

extractedEvidence.quote: MOUNJARO is a glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide (GIP) receptor and glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control

reviewFlags: product-specific indication; verify latest label before publication

claims.statement: DailyMed identifies Zepbound as tirzepatide indicated with reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity for chronic weight-management contexts and for label-specified obstructive sleep apnea context in adults with obesity.

context.population: label-specified adults with obesity/overweight or OSA contexts

extractedEvidence.quote: ZEPBOUND is a glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide (GIP) receptor and glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist indicated in combination with a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity

reviewFlags: product-specific indication; verify latest label before publication

claims.statement: DailyMed tirzepatide product labels list personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN 2 as a contraindication.

context.population: patients with personal or family history of MTC or MEN 2

extractedEvidence.quote: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or in patients with Multiple Endocrine Neoplasia syndrome type 2

claims.statement: FDA advises caution around compounded semaglutide or tirzepatide products and dosing schedules; BioStack should separate approved tirzepatide labels from compounded or vendor-marketed products.

extractedEvidence.quote: Health care providers should be vigilant when prescribing compounded semaglutide or tirzepatide products
extractedEvidence.pageOrSection: FDA concerns with unapproved GLP-1 drugs

reviewFlags: compounded-product claims require separate evidence and review

reviewReasons: Pilot regulatory evidence packet requires human review before publication.
